import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut running = true
  while running
    if i >= n
      running = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          running = false
        end
      when None
        running = false
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut outer = true
  while outer
    i = skip_ws(s, i)
    if i >= n
      outer = false
    else
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)
let targets = parse_ints(line2)
let target = match list.get(targets, 0)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match find_index(xs, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
